field.statusCode.description: The status code of the usage record.

field.status.description: The status of the application process.

field.api.description: The called API, no translation needed.

field.metadata.description: The metadata of the usage record.

title.totalUsed.description: The total number of points consumed.

title.usageTrend.description: The title of the usage trend chart.

shortcuts.last1Day.description: The date range for the last 1 day.

shortcuts.last3Days.description: The date range for the last 3 days.

shortcuts.last7Days.description: The date range for the last 7 days.

shortcuts.last1Month.description: The date range for the last 1 month.

placeholder.to.description: The separator for the end date selected from the date picker.

field.elapsed.description: Elapsed time for a single API request.

field.balanceAfter.description: Remaining balance of the application after this deduction.

option.statusCodeAll.description: Placeholder text for the status-code filter when no value is selected.

shortcuts.thisMonth.description: Date range shortcut for the current month.

button.export.description: Button to export the currently filtered usage records as a CSV file.

button.viewDetail.description: Button to open a dialog showing detailed request and response information.

dialog.detailTitle.description: Dialog title for the request/response detail view.

dialog.noData.description: Shown when no request or response data is present.

field.consumed.description: Column header in the usage breakdown table for the total points a single API consumed within the selected time range.

field.share.description: Column header in the usage breakdown table for a single API's percentage of the total consumption.

field.autoRefresh.description: Toggle label at the top-right of the usage table; when on, the latest records refresh automatically on an interval.

value.processing.description: Placeholder shown in the status code column while an async task has not yet returned a final status code.

value.others.description: Series name in the usage-trend chart that aggregates all APIs outside the top spenders.

title.usageAnalytics.description: Title of the usage analytics card, which contains trend, share, and breakdown view tabs.

view.trend.description: View switch button in the usage analytics card: stacked bar chart of per-API consumption over time.

view.distribution.description: View switch button in the usage analytics card: doughnut chart of each API's consumption share.

view.breakdown.description: View switch button in the usage analytics card: a table listing every API's exact consumption and share.

message.exportFailed.message: Export failed. Please narrow the date range and try again.
message.exportFailed.description: Error toast shown when the CSV export request fails (network or server error).
